requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — SEC Certification for Household Refrigerating Appliances (NCh IEC 60335-2-24)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——家用制冷器具的SEC认证（NCh IEC 60335-2-24）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——家用製冷器具的SEC認證（NCh IEC 60335-2-24）

summary.en: Household refrigerating appliances placed on the Chilean market must obtain certification of electrical safety from the Superintendencia de Electricidad y Combustibles (SEC) before they can be imported, sold, or distributed. SEC operates a mandatory product-certification (certificacion de productos electricos) regime: a refrigerator is a controlled product that must be certified by an SEC-authorised certification body (organismo de certificacion) against the applicable Chilean standard, which adopts the IEC text — for refrigerating appliances this is NCh IEC 60335-2-24 (Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers) read together with the general standard NCh IEC 60335-1. INN (Instituto Nacional de Normalizacion) is the national standards body that adopts the IEC standards as NCh. The certificate, the SEC certification seal (sello SEC), and a Chilean RUT-registered importer are required. Chile's nominal grid is 220 V, 50 Hz single-phase, the same 50 Hz frequency as China.
summary.zh: 投放智利市场的家用制冷器具，在进口、销售或分销前须取得电力与燃料监督局（SEC）的电气安全认证。SEC实行强制性产品认证（certificacion de productos electricos）制度：电冰箱属受控产品，须由SEC授权认证机构（organismo de certificacion）依据相应的智利标准认证，该标准采用IEC文本——制冷器具适用NCh IEC 60335-2-24（制冷器具、冰淇淋器具和制冰机的特殊要求），并与通用标准NCh IEC 60335-1结合使用。INN（国家标准化研究院）为采纳IEC标准为NCh的国家标准机构。须取得证书、SEC认证标志（sello SEC），并须有在智利注册RUT的进口商。智利标称电网为220 V、50 Hz单相，与中国同为50 Hz频率。
summary.zht: 投放智利市場的家用製冷器具，在進口、銷售或分銷前須取得電力與燃料監督局（SEC）的電氣安全認證。SEC實行強制性產品認證（certificacion de productos electricos）制度：電冰箱屬受控產品，須由SEC授權認證機構（organismo de certificacion）依據相應的智利標準認證，該標準採用IEC文本——製冷器具適用NCh IEC 60335-2-24（製冷器具、冰淇淋器具和製冰機的特殊要求），並與通用標準NCh IEC 60335-1結合使用。INN（國家標準化研究院）為採納IEC標準為NCh的國家標準機構。須取得證書、SEC認證標誌（sello SEC），並須有在智利註冊RUT的進口商。智利標稱電網為220 V、50 Hz單相，與中國同為50 Hz頻率。

standards_or_laws: Ley No 18.410 — creates the Superintendencia de Electricidad y Combustibles (SEC) and its product-control mandate
SEC mandatory product certification regime (certificacion de productos electricos) — controlled electrical products require SEC certification before import and sale
NCh IEC 60335-2-24 — Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers (INN adoption of IEC 60335-2-24)
NCh IEC 60335-1 — General requirements for safety of household and similar electrical appliances (read in conjunction with Part 2-24)

summary.en: China's mandatory safety standard for household refrigerating appliances is GB 4706.13-2014 (Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers), technically derived from IEC 60335-2-24:2010 but incorporating Chinese national deviations, read with the general standard GB 4706.1. GB 4706.13 is mandatory (GB) and enforced by SAMR under the China Compulsory Certification (CCC) regime; products must be CCC-certified by a CNCA-designated certification body before sale in China. CCC test reports issued by Chinese laboratories against GB 4706.13 are not automatically accepted by Chile's SEC certification pathway; SEC requires certification by an SEC-authorised certifier against the NCh IEC standard.
summary.zh: 中国家用制冷器具的强制性安全标准为GB 4706.13-2014（家用和类似用途电器的安全——制冷器具、冰淇淋器具和制冰机的特殊要求），技术上源自IEC 60335-2-24:2010，但包含中国国家偏差，并与通用标准GB 4706.1结合使用。GB 4706.13为强制性国家标准（GB），由市场监管总局（SAMR）通过中国强制认证（CCC）制度执行；产品须经CNCA指定认证机构完成CCC认证方可在中国销售。中国实验室依据GB 4706.13出具的CCC检测报告不被智利SEC认证路径自动接受；SEC要求由SEC授权认证机构依据NCh IEC标准进行认证。
summary.zht: 中國家用製冷器具的強制性安全標準為GB 4706.13-2014（家用和類似用途電器的安全——製冷器具、冰淇淋器具和製冰機的特殊要求），技術上源自IEC 60335-2-24:2010，但包含中國國家偏差，並與通用標準GB 4706.1結合使用。GB 4706.13為強制性國家標準（GB），由市場監管總局（SAMR）通過中國強制認證（CCC）制度執行；產品須經CNCA指定認證機構完成CCC認證方可在中國銷售。中國實驗室依據GB 4706.13出具的CCC檢測報告不被智利SEC認證路徑自動接受；SEC要求由SEC授權認證機構依據NCh IEC標準進行認證。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.13-2014 — Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers (mandatory; derived from IEC 60335-2-24:2010 with national deviations; enforced under CCC by SAMR/CNCA)
GB 4706.1-2005 — General requirements (read in conjunction with GB 4706.13)

gap.en: Both China and Chile base their refrigerator safety requirements on IEC 60335-2-24, so the underlying technical content is closely aligned, but the conformity pathway differs: (1) SEC certification must be issued by an SEC-authorised certification body against the NCh IEC standard — a Chinese CCC certificate cannot substitute, although IEC/CB-Scheme test reports (IEC 60335-2-24 basis) covering Chile-relevant configurations can shorten the SEC certification process; (2) Chile's nominal supply is 220 V single-phase 50 Hz, matching China's 50 Hz and similar single-phase voltage, so frequency/voltage re-design is generally not needed — but plug type (Chile uses CEI 23-50 / Europlug-type and the SEC-defined plug system) and marking must be verified; (3) the certificate is tied to a Chilean RUT-registered importer who is the responsible party. Manufacturers should confirm with an SEC-authorised certifier whether existing CB or CCC test data can be leveraged.
gap.zh: 中国与智利的电冰箱安全要求均以IEC 60335-2-24为基础，底层技术内容高度一致，但合格评定路径不同：（1）SEC认证须由SEC授权认证机构依据NCh IEC标准签发——中国CCC证书不能替代，但涵盖智利相关配置的IEC/CB体系检测报告（基于IEC 60335-2-24）可缩短SEC认证流程；（2）智利标称供电为220 V单相50 Hz，与中国50 Hz及相近单相电压一致，因此通常无需进行频率/电压重新设计——但插头类型（智利使用CEI 23-50/欧标插头型及SEC规定的插头系统）和标识须核实；（3）证书与在智利注册RUT的进口商绑定，进口商为责任方。制造商应与SEC授权认证机构确认现有CB或CCC检测数据能否被采用。
gap.zht: 中國與智利的電冰箱安全要求均以IEC 60335-2-24為基礎，底層技術內容高度一致，但合格評定路徑不同：（1）SEC認證須由SEC授權認證機構依據NCh IEC標準簽發——中國CCC證書不能替代，但涵蓋智利相關配置的IEC/CB體系檢測報告（基於IEC 60335-2-24）可縮短SEC認證流程；（2）智利標稱供電為220 V單相50 Hz，與中國50 Hz及相近單相電壓一致，因此通常無需進行頻率/電壓重新設計——但插頭類型（智利使用CEI 23-50/歐標插頭型及SEC規定的插頭系統）和標識須核實；（3）證書與在智利註冊RUT的進口商綁定，進口商為責任方。製造商應與SEC授權認證機構確認現有CB或CCC檢測數據能否被採用。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — SEC certification to NCh IEC 60335-2-24 required before import, sale, or distribution in Chile; certificate must be held by a Chilean RUT-registered importer
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification required under GB 4706.13-2014 before sale in China; administered by SAMR/CNCA

source.publisher: Superintendencia de Electricidad y Combustibles (SEC), Chile

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] SEC certification of electrical safety to NCh IEC 60335-2-24 is mandatory for household refrigerators entering Chile. Because both China and Chile adopt the IEC 60335-2-24 text, the technical content is closely aligned, but a Chinese CCC certificate does not substitute for SEC certification — certification must be obtained from an SEC-authorised certifier and held through a Chilean RUT-registered importer. IEC/CB-Scheme reports may reduce re-testing scope.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 按NCh IEC 60335-2-24取得的SEC电气安全认证是家用电冰箱进入智利的强制要求。由于中智两国均采用IEC 60335-2-24文本，技术内容高度一致，但中国CCC证书不能替代SEC认证——须从SEC授权认证机构取得认证，并通过在智利注册RUT的进口商持有。IEC/CB体系报告或可缩减重新检测范围。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 按NCh IEC 60335-2-24取得的SEC電氣安全認證是家用電冰箱進入智利的強制要求。由於中智兩國均採用IEC 60335-2-24文本，技術內容高度一致，但中國CCC證書不能替代SEC認證——須從SEC授權認證機構取得認證，並通過在智利註冊RUT的進口商持有。IEC/CB體系報告或可縮減重新檢測範圍。
